member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.WatchHistoryManager.Api.WatchHistoryManagerController
member.summary: API endpoints for the Watch History Manager plugin.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.WatchHistoryManager.Api.WatchHistoryManagerFeaturesDto
member.summary: Feature flags exposed to the Jellyfin Web helper script.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.WatchHistoryManager.Api.WatchHistoryManagerFeaturesDto.EnableStartPointButton
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the start point button should be shown.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.WatchHistoryManager.Api.WatchHistoryManagerFeaturesDto.IgnoreSpecials
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether specials / season 0 should be ignored.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.WatchHistoryManager.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.WatchHistoryManager.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.EnableAutoMarkPreviousEpisode
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the automatic previous episode watch-state logic is enabled.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.WatchHistoryManager.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.MinimumWatchedPercentage
member.summary: Gets or sets the minimum watched percentage required before the previous episode may be marked as watched. Example: 75 means the episode must be watched to at least 75 percent.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.WatchHistoryManager.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.MaximumRemainingSeconds
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum remaining seconds allowed before the previous episode may be marked as watched. Example: 240 means the episode may be marked as watched if 4 minutes or less are remaining.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.WatchHistoryManager.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.IgnoreSpecials
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether season 0 / specials should be ignored.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.WatchHistoryManager.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.EnableStartPointButton
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the start point button feature is enabled.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.WatchHistoryManager.Plugin.#ctor(MediaBrowser.Common.Configuration.IApplicationPaths,MediaBrowser.Model.Serialization.IXmlSerializer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.WatchHistoryManager.Services.JavaScriptInjectorRegistrationService
member.summary: Registers the Watch History Manager frontend script with the JavaScript Injector plugin, if available.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.WatchHistoryManager.Services.JavaScriptInjectorRegistrationService.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jellyfin.Plugin.WatchHistoryManager.Services.JavaScriptInjectorRegistrationService})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.WatchHistoryManager.Services.PlaybackMonitorService
member.summary: Monitors playback events and marks the previous episode as watched when the next episode of the same series starts and the configured thresholds are reached.
